title: The Secrets of the Deadly Hotel

scenes.text: A desert hotel holds the secrets to a long-forgotten tragedy.
It happened in the Californian Desert, at the El Mirage Hotel.
In 1939, several guests died in mysterious circumstances within days.
The hotel still stands, but its history remains a haunting mystery.
Many theories suggest a toxic substance may have contributed.
scenes.label: THEORIES ABOUND

scenes.text: Follow for the cases that were never solved.

description: 📍 Californian Desert, USA - 1939. A series of mysterious deaths at a hotel left questions that linger to this day. Follow for daily cold cases!
